case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB VS. DEMETRICE JONES et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, DEMETRICE DOES 1 THROUGH 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-28-2011
DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST RAYMOND A. PATENAUDE, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: AUG-17-2011, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE SEP-01-2011. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-19-2011 CONTINUED TO JAN-09-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-19-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-17-2011 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-17-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
